name: Spaghetti Alla Carbonara (Cheese Spaghetti To
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Bacon, cut into 1/2 inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti as directed on package; drain but do not rinse.
2. Return pasta to kettle.
3. While cooking the spaghetti, fry bacon over medium heat until almost crisp; remove bacon and drain on paper towels.
4. Stir wine into hot bacon fat. Heat to boiling.
5. Boil and stir 3 minutes. Mix bacon, wine, and bacon fat with spaghetti.
6. Add eggs and 1/2 cup of either cheese; toss over low heat until egg adheres to spaghetti and appears cooked.
7. Serve with remaining cheese and freshly ground pepper.
